strength.title: Strength Assessment
strength.subtitle: Five-lift assessment with per-lift scores and combined radar-axis score.
strength.repsAccuracyNudge: Lower reps yield more reliable 1RM estimates. Prefer a heavier near-failure set when available.
strength.fieldsHint: Uses gender, age, and weight from Home profile. Leave both fields empty to skip a lift. Reps capped at 10; model ceilings clamp excess weight with on-screen notice.
strength.combinedHint: Averages rows with both weight and reps. Clear both fields or fill both — no half rows.
strength.capWeightNotice: {{lift}}: entered {{input}} kg exceeds model ceiling ({{max}} kg). Scoring and storage use {{max}} kg.
strength.branchLine: {{weight}} kg × {{reps}} reps · est. 1RM {{oneRm}} kg · lift score {{score}}
strength.nextMilestoneHint: Next Milestone: {{points}} pts until next tier upgrade.
strength.radarClampNote: Mean above per-axis cap (0–200) clamps stored radar value.
strength.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores use this strength axis.
strength.submitDoneWithScore: Saved (strength axis {{score}}) — Home radar and merged scores updated.
strength.profileIncompleteHint: Complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight) for strength scoring.

howToInfo.title: Scoring Notes
howToInfo.intro: Each lift converts to estimated 1RM (Brzycki), then DOTS-style score with age adjustment (McCulloch) against built-in anchor totals.
howToInfo.reps: Use 1–10 reps for reliable 1RM estimates. Enter the weight you actually lifted.
howToInfo.repsAccuracy: Lower reps are more trustworthy for Brzycki extrapolation; high-rep sets can inflate estimated 1RM.
howToInfo.tip: Use consistent depth and range of motion. Not a competition verification tool.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home before calculating strength.
errors.no-inputs: Enter at least one lift with both weight and reps.
errors.pair-incomplete: Enter both weight and reps, or leave both empty per lift.
errors.invalid-weight: Enter positive weight (kg) for each completed lift.
errors.invalid-reps: Enter valid rep count for each completed lift.
errors.reps-out-of-range: Reps must be 1–10 for each completed lift.

singleErrors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home first.
singleErrors.empty-row: Enter weight and reps for this lift, then calculate.
singleErrors.pair-incomplete: Enter both weight and reps, or clear both fields.
singleErrors.invalid-weight: Enter positive weight (kg) for this lift.
singleErrors.invalid-reps: Enter valid rep count for this lift.
singleErrors.reps-out-of-range: Reps must be 1–10 for this lift.
